title: Determined Cat (You Got This)
summary: Motivational meme: a tiny orange tabby with a paw-raised 'fist' and a 'you got this' vibe.
prompt: A wholesome motivational meme: an orange tabby cat in profile, head tilted up with a determined expression and tiny paw raised in a "fist" pose. Soft sunrise gradient background (pink to peach). Bold white meme-style text with black outline at the top: "I CAN DO HARD THINGS". Photo-realistic cat, warm encouraging vibe, square format.
